name: fix
description: Use when you have lint errors, formatting issues, or before committing code to ensure it passes CI.
intent_triggers: 我需要處理 fix 相關工作
幫我啟用 fix 這個 skill
用 agent skill 完成 fix

task.description: Natural-language task or instruction for the agent skill.

context_path.description: Optional workspace path or file context for the skill.

examples.intent: Use the fix skill for this task.

error_codes.1: Skill invocation failed or required context was missing.
